# Codex Critical Preamble Template

```text
Enable Critical Research Mode.

Read CODEX_CONTEXT.md and docs/research_strategy/active_phase.md first, then load only task-relevant context. Preserve frozen GT v1.1 and unrelated user changes.

Classify this work as documentation, smoke/preflight, actual experiment, review, or publication. Use only: supported / qualified_supported / failed_but_informative / forbidden.

Explore aggressively but claim conservatively. For every high-risk direction define: unresolved problem, physical model/equations, observation protocol, success threshold, failure interpretation, allowed wording, forbidden wording, config/script/test/table/report chain, and why it is worth the budget.

Reject synthetic-as-experimental wording, proxy-as-training wording, low-rank-as-full-field wording, local-as-global identifiability, mini-STL-as-full reproduction, and conditional Fourier gain as universal superiority. If a gate fails, preserve the negative evidence and do not relax thresholds after seeing results.
```
